results.text: According to the American Cancer Society, in 2022, there were an estimated 609,360 cancer deaths in the United States. This represents approximately 183 deaths per 100,000 people . Here are some additional statistics: Lung cancer is the leading cause of cancer death, accounting for about 25% of all cancer deaths. Prostate cancer is the second leading cause of cancer death in men, while breast cancer is the second leading cause in women. The overall cancer death rate has been declining in recent years, but it is still higher in certain racial and ethnic groups.
